cards.back: A model that combines the effects of past values (p autoregressive terms), differences in the data (d integrated terms), and errors (q moving average terms)
A model that adds an additional autoregressive term, indicating a higher order of dependence in the data
A model that adds both an additional autoregressive term and an additional integrated term, indicating a higher order of dependence and differencing in the data
A model that adds all three additional terms, indicating a very high order of dependence, differencing, and moving average terms
The non-padded ARIMA model has no autoregressive terms, while the padded ARIMA model has one additional autoregressive term
